name: GIGABYTE Z790I AORUS ULTRA Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8000(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.0 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - Intel Killer 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E
shortName: GIGABYTE Z790I AORUS ULTRA Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Mini-ITX motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR5 support, PCIe 5.0, and WiFi 6E.
